# Sonu Zaiswal (Sonu Kumar)

Sonu Zaiswal is a multi-disciplinary professional based in Kathmandu, Nepal, specializing in Offensive Security (Red Team Operations) and Graphic Design.

## Expertise

- **Cybersecurity**: Vulnerability Assessment, Network Security, Red Team Operations, OSINT, and Penetration Testing. Ranked in the Top 1% globally on TryHackMe. Published [The Ultimate Guide to Securing Your Home Network in Nepal (2026)](https://kumarsonu.com.np/blog/how-to-secure-home-network-nepal-2026.html).
- **Graphic Design**: Brand Identity, Editorial Design, UI/UX, and Motion Graphics. Experienced in Adobe Creative Suite and Figma.

## Professional Experience

- **WebSurfer**: L2 Network Support Engineer.
- **UHS Holdings**: Senior Graphic Designer & Web Developer.
- **Sama Publications**: Senior Graphic Designer.

## Projects

- **WHOIS Threat Analyzer**: OSINT tool for domain risk scoring.
- **AI Traffic Monitoring**: YOLO-based real-time detection system.
- **Network Mapper Automation**: Python-based Nmap automation.
